_doc: STANDARD CIRCUIT BLOCKS (电路块库) — the topology tier above standard-parts.json.
A block is a KNOWN-GOOD peripheral subcircuit (CH340 USB-serial, ESP32 auto-download,
ESP32-S3 module, button, USB-hub, buck) whose INTERNAL wiring is fixed and can be copied
verbatim; only the boundary nets (ports) get rebound to the host design and RefDes get
reallocated.
Three-tier library model:
standard-parts.json    → 器件级 (which part / LCSC C-number)
internal/blocks/data/*.json → 电路块级 (how those parts connect + layout constraints)  ← HERE
design-flow.md         → 流程级 (S0–S6 / P0–P10)
FILE LAYOUT — one block per file (internal/blocks/data/<id-without-block-prefix>.json).
The filename is the block id minus the `block.` prefix (ch340c_usb_serial.json →
block.ch340c_usb_serial). This file (`_schema.json`, underscore-prefixed) holds the
shared _doc/_schema/libraryUuid and is NOT a block. `easyeda blocks` (go:embed) compiles this dir into the binary,
skips `_`-prefixed files, and assembles the library — it is the single loader seam, so
consumers (agent, sch block apply) never care that the library is many files. Why per
block: the community model is one-block-per-PR, so a file boundary per block means zero
merge conflicts + clean per-file git-blame attribution. `category` stays a FIELD (filter
with `easyeda blocks ls --category`), never a directory boundary.
MACHINE SCHEMA — `_block.schema.json` is the executable JSON Schema for stable fields; this file remains the human-readable field guide.
HARD RULE — a block only enters the library as READY after structured verification marks every production gate passed
(`verification.schematic/component_selection/pcb_drc/bringup` all passed) with evidence. Until then
it is verified or draft, not production-ready. NEVER hand-write a topology from memory — harvest it from a validated oshwhub
board or an official reference design (see oshwhub training loop). A draft block MAY carry
a proposed `internal_nets` sourced from an official ref, but stays draft until proven; use
the string `pending` when the topology itself is not yet settled.
Pin references use FUNCTIONAL PIN NAMES ("CH340.TXD"), never pin numbers — names are
symbol-stable, so reuse needs zero pin-renumbering. VERIFY names with `sch read` at
validation time (guessed names bite: CH340 is D+/D-/DTR#/RTS#, not UDP/UDM/DTR). `parts`
values point back into standard-parts.json by role key so BOM/LCSC stays single-sourced.
COMMUNITY-BUILT & CREDITED — this is an open, co-built asset. Every block carries its
`author` / `contributors` (GitHub @handles, never removed) so a one-time contribution
earns permanent, traceable credit. Contribution standard, PR checklist, split trigger, and
the validation gate live in references/standard-blocks-contributing.md. Blocks are
versioned (`added`/`updated`) and evolve as parts/footprints change.
CONSTRAINT MAPS (可拓展的约束维度) — beyond wiring, a block carries a family of optional
constraint maps describing how it must be laid out. Each is a top-level key; adding a new
dimension = adding a new map (no restructure). Current dimensions:
pcb_layout — general layout rules (LIST of {rule,target,constraint,value,severity}).
placement  — 结构件摆放 (MAP <ROLE>→{board_edge,edge,side,orientation,severity,reason}):
connectors/terminals/USB/antenna/buttons/LEDs that must sit at a board edge
and on a chosen copper side. THIS is where '此件要不要靠板边、放哪一面' lives.
signals    — 信号特性 (MAP <name>→{nets,type,impedance,length_match,track_width_mil,net_class,route,keepout,severity}):
diff-pair / high-speed / RF / analog-sensitive net routing needs (USB D±, RS-485 A/B, RF).
track_width_mil / net_class (可选) 声明该组网的规范铜宽 / 角色,覆盖 daemon 的 netRole 启发式(消费待 block-apply)。
silk       — 丝印标记 (MAP <ROLE>→{label,pins,note,clearance,severity}): 引脚级/极性丝印——
per-pin 标记(电源 +/−、总线 A/B/G、UART RX/TX、极性阴极 K)+ 功能名 label + 警示 note。
铁律 clearance=outside-body:每个标记须落在器件本体/courtyard 之外,装配后不被元件或连接器塑料遮住。
Future maps (thermal, emc, clearance-zones…) follow the same shape: a top-level map keyed by
role/net/signal, each record carrying `severity` + `reason`. The go:embed loader keeps the full
JSON (Raw) so unknown maps pass through untouched (forward-compatible) and `easyeda blocks show`
prints them; `go test ./internal/blocks/` validates the known maps (placement roles exist in
parts; signals carry a type + nets; silk roles exist in parts; severity ∈ {must,should}).

<id-without-block-prefix>.json.schema_version: integer; v2 adds structured verification while retaining legacy validated during migration
<id-without-block-prefix>.json.id: block.<id> — MUST match the filename (minus block.) — `go test ./internal/blocks/` checks this
<id-without-block-prefix>.json.category: button | comms | indicator | mcu | mcu-support | power | protection | rf | sensing | storage | usb | usb-serial
<id-without-block-prefix>.json.author: original contributor — GitHub @handle;署名不删,让贡献可追、有归属
contributors: @handle of anyone who later fixed/updated this block
<id-without-block-prefix>.json.added: version this block first entered the library, e.g. v0.6.0
<id-without-block-prefix>.json.updated: version of the last change (bump when parts/topology/rules change)
<id-without-block-prefix>.json.validated: legacy evidence string; retained for migration compatibility, superseded by verification when present

verification.production_ready: true only when all four stages are passed

<ROLE>.value_override: optional — override the part's default value for this role
<ROLE>.note: 选型注意 / why this part / substitution caveat

<PORTNAME>.default_net: suggested net name if host has no preference

schematic_notes: 原理图链接注意 — netflag-needs-real-wire, decoupling adjacency in-sheet, net-label
conventions, pins that MUST be tied/pulled, do-not-float pins, etc.

pcb_layout.rule: short slug e.g. decap-adjacency | keepout | trace-width
pcb_layout.value: quantified spec if any (<=2mm / >=0.5mm width / etc)

placement._doc: CONSTRAINT MAP『结构件摆放』——按 <ROLE> 键。结构元器件(连接器/端子/USB/天线/按键/指示灯/屏蔽罩)常须靠板边、并指定放哪个铜面。非结构件(电阻电容)不必列。

<ROLE>.anchor: bool(可选)——非板边件的『刻意归位』标记。true=place-constrained 必须把它钉在原位(锚定档,不甩到板角),用于 JP701 这类电气上属某处(总线末端)却因位号前缀会被误判为普通卫星的件。board_edge=false 但只是普通建议(如去耦电容放顶面)时 **不要** 设,以免被冻结在坏位。
<ROLE>.edge: any | user-facing | top | bottom | left | right — 靠哪条板边(user-facing=面向用户操作/插拔的那条边)
<ROLE>.side: top | bottom | either — 放哪个铜面(双面板:如矮件/SD 卡座常放底面)
<ROLE>.orientation: 自由文本,如 开口朝板外 / 天线端伸出板外 / 长边贴板边
<ROLE>.reason: 为什么须这样摆(如 USB-C 需插拔)

keepout._doc: RF/天线禁铜区(可选,仅带 PCB 天线的模组/器件才列)。由 `easyeda pcb antenna-keepout` 消费:在天线器件长轴上无焊盘的一端(几何确定)生成覆盖全铜层的 no-copper region;深度取本条 end_frac 上限并被无焊盘区裁剪,绝不压到接地焊盘。
keepout.match: 器件名子串(小写包含匹配,如 wroom)——把已放置件按 manufacturerId 映射到本条
keepout.end_frac: 0..1 —— 禁铜深度占模组长轴的比例(如 0.3);实际深度 = min(end_frac×长轴, 无焊盘条带)
keepout.layers: all —— 目前仅支持全铜层
keepout.reason: 为什么(如 模组 PCB 天线下方全层需净空避免失谐)

openings._doc: 连接器接线口/插面方向(可选,数组)。焊盘对称的端子(KF301 螺钉端子/排针)其开口是塑料本体功能面,不在 PCB 几何里 → 声明于此,place-constrained 据此把开口自动转向板外(而非只提醒手调)。按 manufacturerId 子串匹配已放置件。
openings.match: 器件名子串(小写包含,如 kf301)
openings.local: +x | -x | +y | -y —— 开口在封装本地(rotation 0)坐标系的朝向;真机标定:某取向下看开口指向反推

signals._doc: CONSTRAINT MAP『信号特性』——按 <信号组名> 键。高速/差分/敏感/大电流网络的布线特性需求(差分阻抗、等长、隔离、线宽…)。普通信号不必列。

<信号组名>.type: diff_pair | single_high_speed | analog_sensitive | high_current | clock | rf
<信号组名>.net_class: high-current | power-trunk | power-branch | signal | gnd (可选;覆盖 netRole 启发式)
<信号组名>.route: 布线要求自由文本(等长/紧耦合/尽量短/少过孔/线宽)
<信号组名>.keepout: 隔离/护地/远离开关电源与时钟
<信号组名>.reason: 为什么(如 USB2.0 高速差分 / RS-485 差分 / RF 50Ω)

silk._doc: CONSTRAINT MAP『丝印标记』——按 <ROLE> 键。为需现场辨识/防接反的元件声明:label(whole-part 功能名)、pins(引脚级标记:pin 引用→丝印文字,pin 引用与 internal_nets 一致,端子用号 1/2/3、LED 用 +/-)、note(警示)。铁律 clearance=outside-body:每个标记必须落在该件本体/courtyard 之外、对应引脚外侧,装配后不被元件本体或连接器塑料遮住(否则等于没标)。只列需辨识的件(电源端子/总线端子/极性件/按键/接口),普通无源不列。

<ROLE>.label: whole-part 功能名丝印(可选),如 USB-C / microSD / BOOT / +12V IN

pins.<pin 引用>: 该引脚丝印文字——如 1→"+" 2→"−" / 1→"A" 2→"B" 3→"G" / -→"K"(阴极)。pin 引用同 internal_nets 的写法

<ROLE>.note: 警示自由文本(可选),如 A/B=IC:芯片定义与 Modbus 规范相反,勿接反
<ROLE>.clearance: outside-body — 每个标记置于对应 pad 本体外侧,装配后可见(强制不变式,值恒为此串)

<id-without-block-prefix>.json.bom_note: quantity/cost note across the block (e.g. all 0402, 1 extended part)
